items.title: Wells Fargo Reiterates Buy on Visa (V) Amid Expansion Announcements and Proposal Rejections

items.title: These fintech stocks are loved by analysts and could bounce back in a big way
items.description: Shares of PayPal and Block are both cheap relative to historic levels, but only one of them commands heavy enthusiasm from analysts.
